Cybersecurity_Specialist: The name of the cybersecurity specialist who deployed or updated the alert rule
Target_System: The system, such as SIEM, where the alert rule was deployed or updated
Alert_Rule_Description: A detailed description of the alert rule
Alert_Purpose: The purpose of the alert rule, such as detecting malformed authentication headers
